brightsmith_agentAttribution.reasoning: Bronze ingest of BEA Regional Price Parities (SARPP, All Items, 2024) for 50 states + DC. Primary path is the BEA JSON API; fallback is a locally-cached CSV whose columns mirror the API field layout so a single parser handles both. For this run the CSV fallback was used (51 rows loaded via csv_cache). GeoFips is normalized from the BEA 5-digit state form (e.g. '06000') to a 2-character zero-padded state FIPS ('06'); metro/CBSA rows (5-digit non-state) and territory rows are filtered with a warning. DataValue (string) is coerced to double; TimePeriod (string) is coerced to int; GeoName is passed through verbatim. Framework metadata (ingested_at, source_url, source_method, load_date) is injected by BaseIngestor.ingest().

brightsmith_runMetrics.dataVintage: BEA Regional Economic Accounts, SARPP, LineCode=1, Year=2024 (released February 2026)

documentation.description: Ingest BEA Regional Price Parities (SARPP, All Items) for 50 states + DC from the BEA JSON API with CSV cache fallback. Produces the bronze.bea_rpp Iceberg table at grain geo_fips.

fields.name: GeoFips
fields.description: 5-digit BEA geographic FIPS code (state-level form ends in '000')

fields.name: DataValue
fields.description: Regional Price Parity index as string (e.g. '110.7')

fields.name: CL_UNIT
fields.description: Classification unit — informational only, not ingested

fields.name: UNIT_MULT
fields.description: Unit multiplier — informational only, not ingested

fields.name: GeoFips
fields.description: Mirrors BEA API field name — 5-digit state FIPS

fields.name: geo_fips
fields.transformation: DERIVED from GeoFips via zero-pad normalization (5-digit '06000' -> 2-char '06')

fields.name: rpp_all_items
fields.transformation: DERIVED from DataValue via string -> float coercion

fields.name: data_year
fields.transformation: DERIVED from TimePeriod via string -> int coercion; defaults to 2024 if null

fields.name: ingested_at
fields.transformation: FRAMEWORK: UTC timestamp at ingest time

fields.name: source_url
fields.transformation: FRAMEWORK: BEA API URL (API key REDACTED) from get_source_url()

fields.name: source_method
fields.transformation: FRAMEWORK: 'bea_api' or 'csv_cache' — resolved in ingest() based on actual fetch path

geo_fips.transformationDescription: BEA returns state-level GeoFips as 5 digits ending in '000' (e.g. '06000' for California). _normalize_geo_fips strips trailing zeros and zero-pads to a 2-character state FIPS ('06'). Metro/CBSA 5-digit codes (e.g. '31080') are returned unchanged by the normalizer and then filtered out by the state-FIPS allow-list (50 states + DC); territory codes (60, 66, 69, 72, 78) are likewise filtered.

geo_name.transformationDescription: Direct passthrough via _coerce_string: trimmed, empty strings become null. No renaming of state labels.

rpp_all_items.transformationDescription: BEA returns DataValue as a string (e.g. '110.7'). _coerce_double strips commas/whitespace and coerces to float. Units are 'index, national = 100.0'. No rescaling applied.

data_year.transformationDescription: TimePeriod is a year string (e.g. '2024'). _coerce_int converts via int(float(value)); falls back to DEFAULT_YEAR (2024) if null or unparseable.

source_url.transformationDescription: Framework-injected by BaseIngestor via BeaRppIngestor.get_source_url(): BEA API URL template with API_KEY redacted. Same value whether the API or CSV cache was used — represents the canonical source locator, not the fetch path.

source_method.transformationDescription: Framework-injected. BeaRppIngestor.ingest() overrides BaseIngestor to first run fetch() and inspect the returned payload's source_method ('bea_api' vs 'csv_cache'), then passes that value through to the framework so row-level source_method reflects the actual fetch path. This run: 'csv_cache'.

ingested_at.transformationDescription: Framework-injected: UTC timestamp at ingest time.
